ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Ms. Alavi stated that the purchase of the Merrill Lynch portfolio was a mistake, that the bulk of her Client's cases are not under Court supervision, that he forgot that this trust was under Court supervision and that the investments are all in line as if it was a conservatorship. Ms. Alavi also stated that she was not aware of the investments until they were made, that it was done in error, that she believes Merrill Lynch's fees are 1% of the management fee for the entire year and that the Court can cross out the language in the order that indicates that the fee is at 1% or 1/12 of the fair market of the portfolio. The Seventh Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
